biography: Hailing from Espoo Ringside Golf, Tommy represents a familiar presence in the esteemed Hector Trophée, having graced the fairways of this unique pair competition on three previous occasions. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy have yet to find a home in his collection, his consistent participation underscores a steadfast dedication to the event.

Tommy’s approach to the game is characterized by a quiet determination and a commitment to competitive play, traits that have endeared him to fellow participants and spectators alike. Though he will not be competing in the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his past efforts have undoubtedly contributed to the tournament's rich tapestry of competition. He remains an active figure within the Hector events, suggesting a future return to challenge for the titles that have thus far eluded him.
